class.name: ASTagBase
class.brief_description: Base structure for all Ability System tag types with common functionality.
class.description:
ASTagBase provides the foundation for all tag types in the Ability System. It contains common functionality for tag validation, type checking, and utility methods.
This is the base struct that ASNameTag, ASConditionalTag, and ASEventTag inherit from. It follows the LimboAI bb_param pattern for type-safe tag handling.
All tags must be registered in the AbilitySystem global registry to be considered valid.

method.name: is_valid
method.description: Returns true if the tag is registered in the AbilitySystem global registry.

method.name: is_name_tag
method.description: Returns true if this tag is a NAME type tag.

method.name: is_conditional_tag
method.description: Returns true if this tag is a CONDITIONAL type tag.

method.name: is_event_tag
method.description: Returns true if this tag is an EVENT type tag.
